definition: Resting orders — stop losses and pending orders clustered at predictable price levels.
feeds_into: draw_on_liquidity (the nearest unswept level is the DOL)
turtle_soup (turtle soup IS a liquidity sweep + reversal)
related_to: dealing_range (range high/low are the primary liquidity levels)
equal_highs_lows (engineered liquidity — a subset of liquidity)

buy_side_liquidity_BSL.definition: Stops from shorts + buy-stops from breakout traders sitting ABOVE swing highs, equal highs, resistance.
buy_side_liquidity_BSL.created_by: market_structure — every swing high creates BSL above it
buy_side_liquidity_BSL.targeted_by: liquidity_sweep when price raids above highs

sell_side_liquidity_SSL.definition: Stops from longs + sell-stops sitting BELOW swing lows, equal lows, support.
sell_side_liquidity_SSL.created_by: market_structure — every swing low creates SSL below it
sell_side_liquidity_SSL.targeted_by: liquidity_sweep when price raids below lows

external_liquidity.what: Swing highs and lows — where most stops cluster.
external_liquidity.role: TARGET — price moves TO these levels to take liquidity. These are your TP.
external_liquidity.connection: external_liquidity IS draw_on_liquidity. The TP target is always external liquidity.

internal_liquidity.what: FVGs, order blocks, breaker blocks — price inefficiencies inside the range.
internal_liquidity.role: ENTRY — you enter AT these levels after external liquidity is taken.
internal_liquidity.connection: internal_liquidity = order_blocks + fair_value_gaps + breaker_blocks. These concepts ARE internal liquidity.

equal_highs_lows.definition: Two or more swing highs/lows at nearly the same price — engineered liquidity magnets.
equal_highs_lows.connection: Equal highs/lows are a SUBSET of liquidity. They form at dealing_range boundaries or within structure. They are HIGH-PRIORITY draw_on_liquidity targets.

draw_on_liquidity.definition: The nearest unswept external liquidity in the expected direction. This is WHERE price is going.
draw_on_liquidity.depends_on: market_structure (to identify unswept swing points) + liquidity (to know which levels are unswept)
draw_on_liquidity.feeds_into: trade execution — draw_on_liquidity IS your TP target
